name: IRC_EMP_EVENTS_LOCATIONS
description: This table stores the event location related details.

columns.Name: EMP_EVENT_LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for this table. This is an auto-generated field.

columns.Name: FORMAT_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the event is in-person or virtual as a lookup code, ORA_IRC_EMP_EVENT_FORMAT

columns.Name: MAX_CAPACITY_INPERSON
columns.Comments: Max capacity of the In person event in a location

columns.Name: MAX_CAPACITY_VIRTUAL
columns.Comments: Max capacity of the Virtual event in a location

columns.Name: COUNTRY_CODE
columns.Comments: Country code of the Country where event is occurring from HZ_GEOGRAPHIES.

columns.Name: STATE_GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: GEOGRAPHY_ID of the State where event is occurring. Foreign key to HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: CITY_GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: GEOGRAPHY_ID of the City where event is occurring. Foreign key to HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: LOCATION_DETAILS
columns.Comments: This column stores the Location Details for In person event

columns.Name: WEB_CONF_LINK
columns.Comments: Web conference link for virtual event

columns.Name: MEETING_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Used to store meeting details of virtual events

columns.Name: REGISTERED_COUNT_INPERSON
columns.Comments: The count of the employees registered for the in_person employee event

columns.Name: REGISTERED_COUNT_VIRTUAL
columns.Comments: The count of the employees registered for the virtual employee event

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
